title: Destructuring Objects and Arrays
description: Extract values from objects and arrays with a clean syntax.

slides.title: Object Destructuring 🧩
Renaming and Default Values
slides.content:
## Aliasing and Defaults

You can rename the variable:
```javascript
const { name: fullName, age: years } = person;
console.log(fullName); // Alice
```

You can also provide default values in case the property is missing:
```javascript
const { name, country = 'USA' } = person;
console.log(country); // USA (since person has no country)
```

slides.title: Array Destructuring 🧩
Practical Destructuring

quizData.question:
What is the value of `y`?
```javascript
const [x, y = 10] = [5];
```
quizData.explanation: The array has only one element, so `x` gets 5, and `y` uses the default value 10.
